name: logo-generator
description: Generate logos using Replicate AI and make them transparent with background removal.
capabilities: Generate logos from text descriptions using Replicate AI
Remove backgrounds automatically for transparent logos
Customize logo prompts with company names and styles
Process images with Sharp for optimal quality
author: AayushBaniya2006
securitySummary: This skill is a legitimate logo generation tool using Replicate AI. All 109 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES: the scanner confused TypeScript template literals and markdown code formatting with shell command execution; flagged standard API token environment access as 'sensitive file access'; and misidentified 'K_EULER' (a diffusion model scheduler name) as a weak cryptographic algorithm. The script makes legitimate network calls to Replicate API and writes output to a specific local path only.
valueStatement: Creating logos requires design skills and expensive software. This skill uses AI to generate custom logos from text prompts and removes backgrounds automatically for transparent, professional results.
limitations: Requires REPLICATE_API_TOKEN environment variable to be set
Limited to the specific logoai model on Replicate
Output is fixed to PNG format at public/assets/logo.png

useCases.title: Quick brand identity
useCases.description: Generate a professional logo for your startup without hiring a designer

useCases.title: Channel branding
useCases.description: Create logos for YouTube channels, podcasts, or social media profiles

useCases.title: App icons
useCases.description: Generate icons and logos for web or mobile applications

promptTemplates.title: Simple logo
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a logo for my company. Prompt: 'Minimalistic tech logo for [company name]'

promptTemplates.title: Styled logo
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a modern logo with prompt: 'Modern geometric logo for [brand] with blue and white colors'

promptTemplates.title: Detailed design
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a professional logo. Prompt: 'Elegant minimalist logo for [business] featuring a mountain icon in navy blue'

promptTemplates.title: Custom style
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a unique logo. Prompt: 'Vintage style badge logo for [company] with retro typography and gold accents'

bestPractices: Include the company or brand name in your prompt for accurate results
Specify the style (minimalist, modern, vintage) for better outcomes
Set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in .env.local before generating logos
antiPatterns: Using vague prompts like 'make a cool logo' without details
Forgetting to set the REPLICATE_API_TOKEN environment variable
Generating logos without specifying brand context or style preferences

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through the skill system.

faq.question: What image formats does it output?
faq.answer: The skill outputs PNG format with full transparency for professional use.

faq.question: How do I connect to Replicate?
faq.answer: Set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in your .env, .env.local, or .env.production file.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: The skill only sends prompts to Replicate API. Generated images stay in your project.

faq.question: What if the logo generation fails?
faq.answer: Check that REPLICATE_API_TOKEN is valid and has sufficient API credits available.

faq.question: How is this different from other logo tools?
faq.answer: This skill combines logo generation and background removal in one automated workflow.
